summary: 二维 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 复曲面码承认交换电和磁准粒子的全局对称性，称为电磁对偶性。已知的实现包括晶格平移对称性、Clifford 电路生成的精确 $\mathbb{Z}_4$ 对称性以及非 Clifford 电路生成的精确 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 对称性。我们证明克利福德电磁对偶性无法实现精确的内部 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 对称性。对于泛型奇数 $l$ 的 $l$ 晶格单元，这对于具有粗平移不变性的对称性得到了严格证明。因此，精确的内部 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 电磁对偶性必须是非 Clifford，而通用内部 Clifford 实现必然具有 $\mathbb{Z}_{2^m}$ 代数，其中 $m\ge 2$。我们的结果表明精确的电磁对偶性和电路的克利福德层次结构之间存在意想不到的联系。

title: Resonant two-cluster scattering in a quasi-one-dimensional Bose gas
abstract: We investigate two-cluster scattering in a quasi-one-dimensional Bose gas. We focus on the effective three-body interaction induced by transverse confinement, which is the leading term for breaking integrability in the quasi-one-dimensional setting. Exploiting the Lüscher formula and the integrability of the Lieb-Liniger Bose gas, we find a finite and positive scattering length for elastic two-cluster scattering. The resulting scattering lengths indicate the emergence of a resonance.
summary: 我们研究准一维玻色气体中的两簇散射。我们关注横向约束引起的有效三体相互作用，这是准一维环境中破坏可积性的主要术语。利用 Lüscher 公式和 Lieb-Liniger Bose 气体的可积性，我们找到了弹性二簇散射的有限正散射长度。由此产生的散射长度表明共振的出现。

title: Intrinsically ultralow thermal conductivity in all-inorganic superatomic bulk crystals
abstract: Superatomic compounds, composed of atomic clusters interwoven by weak chemical bonds exhibit large anharmonicity vibrations, are excellent candidates for ultralow thermal conductivity (\k{appa}) materials. However, growing bulk superatomic single crystals is challenging due to complex chemical composition and chemical bonds, and studies on their intrinsic thermal property are scarce. Here, we grew high-quality superatomic single crystals of Re6Se8Te7 and Re6Te15, both of which are narrow band gap semiconductors that change into metals under external physical pressure. At room-temperature, the \k{appa} are 0.32 W m-1 K-1 and 0.53 W m-1 K-1 in Re6Se8Te7 and Re6Te15, respectively, ranking among the lowest value reported in all-inorganic bulk crystals. It is mainly attributed to the large Grüneisen parameter (1.93) and low average sound speed (< 1482 m/s), which are due to soft Te7 nets weakly embedded among the rigid Re6Se8 (Re6Te8) quasi-cubic clusters. The appearance of boson peak, i. e., hump of C(T)/T3, verifies the existence of disordered phonon transports. Besides, the temperature dependence of \k{appa} can be described by classic Debye-Callaway model. Notably, above 350 K, the \k{appa} values of Re6Se8Te7 and Re6Te15 are remarkably close to the upper limit derived from glassy-like diffusion model. This finding sets the superatomic compounds as a promising family for searching ultralow-\k{appa} and energy management materials.
summary:
超原子化合物由通过弱化学键交织的原子簇组成，表现出较大的非谐振动，是超低导热率（\k{appa}）材料的绝佳候选者。然而，由于复杂的化学成分和化学键，生长大块超原子单晶具有挑战性，并且对其内在热性质的研究很少。在这里，我们生长了高质量的 Re6Se8Te7 和 Re6Te15 超原子单晶，这两种材料都是窄带隙半导体，在外部物理压力下会转变为金属。在室温下，Re6Se8Te7和Re6Te15的\k{appa}分别为0.32 W m-1 K-1和0.53 W m-1 K-1，是全无机块状晶体中报道的最低值之一。这主要归因于较大的 Grüneisen 参数 (1.93) 和较低的平均声速 (< 1482 m/s)，这是由于软 Te7 网弱嵌入刚性 Re6Se8 (Re6Te8) 准立方团簇中造成的。玻色子峰的出现，i。即 C(T)/T3 的驼峰，验证了无序声子输运的存在。此外，\k{appa} 的温度依赖性可以用经典的 Debye-Callaway 模型来描述。

值得注意的是，在 350 K 以上，Re6Se8Te7 和 Re6Te15 的 k{appa} 值非常接近玻璃状扩散模型得出的上限。这一发现使超原子化合物成为寻找超低 k{appa} 和能量管理材料的有前途的家族。

title: Geometric Foundations of Stochastic and Quantum Dynamics
abstract: We develop a geometric formulation of stochastic dynamics in which noise, diffusion, path probabilities, fluctuation theorems, and entropy production arise from the intrinsic geometry of an evolving manifold rather than from externally imposed randomness. Within the theory of moving manifolds, we establish a curvature-noise correspondence: fluctuations are governed by the inverse curvature tensor, while entropy production is controlled by curvature deformation. The invariant continuity law on a moving hypersurface yields a geometric Fokker-Planck equation, and curvature-velocity coupling generates a quadratic Onsager-Machlup functional determining path weights. The resulting entropy functional satisfies a curvature-driven monotonicity law, providing a geometric derivation of the Second Law. In two dimensions, the curvature invariant reduces to Gaussian curvature and encodes topology, so topological transitions produce discrete entropy jumps. When the ambient space carries a Minkowskian signature, the same curvature-kinetic quadratic form that generates dissipative thermal weights produces oscillatory phase weights, and the Laplace-Beltrami operator governing entropy evolution acquires a Schrödinger-type structure. This provides a geometric resolution of the apparent distinction between classical stochastic behaviour and quantum dynamics. These results show that stochastic behaviour, thermodynamic irreversibility, and quantum transition amplitudes are unified within the moving manifold framework. Geometry does not merely accommodate stochasticity; stochastic behaviour arises as a consequence of deterministic geometric evolution. The theory predicts curvature-controlled anisotropic diffusion, entropy jumps at topology-changing events, and a geometric thermal-quantum crossover in which classical stochastic weights and quantum amplitudes are generated by the same curvature-kinetic action.
summary:
我们开发了随机动力学的几何公式​​，其中噪声、扩散、路径概率、涨落定理和熵产生源自演化流形的内在几何结构，而不是外部强加的随机性。在移动流形理论中，我们建立了曲率-噪声对应关系：波动由反曲率张量控制，而熵产生由曲率变形控制。移动超曲面上的不变连续性定律产生几何 Fokker-Planck 方程，曲率-速度耦合生成确定路径权重的二次 Onsager-Machlup 函数。由此产生的熵函数满足曲率驱动的单调性定律，提供了第二定律的几何推导。在二维中，曲率不变量简化为高斯曲率并对拓扑进行编码，因此拓扑转变会产生离散熵跳跃。

当环境空间带有闵可夫斯基特征时，产生耗散热权重的相同曲率动力学二次形式会产生振荡相权重，并且控制熵演化的拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子获得薛定谔型结构。这为经典随机行为和量子动力学之间的明显区别提供了几何分辨率。这些结果表明，随机行为、热力学不可逆性和量子跃迁振幅在移动流形框架内是统一的。几何不仅能适应随机性，还能适应随机性。随机行为是确定性几何演化的结果。该理论预测了曲率控制的各向异性扩散、拓扑变化事件中的熵跃以及几何热量子交叉，其中经典随机权重和量子振幅由相同的曲率动力学作用生成。

title: Incipient magnetic instability in RuO$_2$ with random phase approximation
abstract: We study the instability in RuO$_2$ using the Hartree-Fock approximation followed by the random phase approximation. We employ a three-orbital Hubbard model without spin-orbit coupling. An analysis of the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the static susceptibility in the non-magnetic phase for various local interaction parameters $U$, $J_H$, and hole doping $n$ shows that the spin susceptibility is the dominant response channel. In the stoichiometric system without spin-orbit coupling, commensurate altermagnetic order is identified as the leading instability at sufficiently low temperatures, whereas at higher temperatures or finite hole doping, incommensurate wave vectors emerge. To elucidate the origin of the magnetic instability, we analyze the band spitting by the staggered Weiss field and discuss the qualitative difference between altermagnets and antiferromagnets.
summary: 我们使用 Hartree-Fock 近似和随机相位近似来研究 RuO$_2$ 的不稳定性。我们采用没有自旋轨道耦合的三轨道哈伯德模型。对各种局域相互作用参数$U$、$J_H$和空穴掺杂$n$的非磁相静态磁化率特征值和特征向量的分析表明，自旋磁化率是主要响应通道。在没有自旋轨道耦合的化学计量系统中，在足够低的温度下，相称的交变磁序被认为是主要的不稳定性，而在较高的温度或有限孔掺杂下，会出现不相称的波矢量。为了阐明磁不稳定性的起源，我们分析了交错韦斯场的能带分裂，并讨论了交变磁体和反铁磁体之间的质的差异。

title: Ergotropic rearrangement of phase space density
abstract: The explicit expression of ergotropy (a.k.a. available energy) of a classical system is known for the case when the system phase space density is continuous and with no plateaus. Here we provide the general expression of ergotropy that applies without those limitations. It easily follows upon casting the ergotropy problem as a function rearrangement problem. This leads to the notion of "ergotropic rearangement" which generalises that of "symmetric decreasing rearrangement" (an advanced topic of measure theory). We apply it to investigate the fate of classical ergotropy in the thermodynamic limit, and find that any density of the form $\rho=f(H_0)$ is asymptotically passive, where $H_0$ is the system Hamiltonian and $f$ a generic function.
summary: 当系统相空间密度连续并且没有平台时，经典系统的各向异性（又称可用能量）的显式表达是已知的。在这里，我们提供了不受这些限制的适用的一般表达式。将各向异性问题转化为函数重排问题后，很容易得出结论。这导致了“各向性重排”的概念，它概括了“对称递减重排”（测度论的高级主题）。我们应用它来研究热力学极限下经典各向异性的命运，并发现 $\rho=f(H_0)$ 形式的任何密度都是渐近被动的，其中 $H_0$ 是系统哈密顿量，$f$ 是泛型函数。

title: Strain-stiffening critical exponents of fiber networks under uniaxial deformation
abstract: Disordered fiber networks exhibit a floppy to rigid mechanical phase transition as a function of connectivity. Sub-isostatically connected networks can undergo this transition via straining. Critical exponents governing this transition have been estimated theoretically and by numerical simulations of various types of networks. In this study, we present improved results, achieved through a combination of refined numerical simulations, larger system sizes and incorporation of theoretical predictions for better post-simulation analysis. We also report the evolution of the critical strain and critical exponents as the network is sheared while being subjected to non-volume-preserving uniaxial deformations.
summary: 无序的光纤网络表现出作为连接性函数的软到硬的机械相变。亚均衡连接的网络可以通过应变经历这种转变。控制这一转变的关键指数已经通过理论和各种类型网络的数值模拟进行了估计。在这项研究中，我们通过精细的数值模拟、更大的系统规模以及结合理论预测以实现更好的模拟后分析，提出了改进的结果。我们还报告了当网络受到非体积保持单轴变形时剪切时临界应变和临界指数的演变。

title: Geometry-controlled competition between axis centering and detwinning in fivefold-twinned gold nanoparticles
abstract: Fivefold-twinned metal nanoparticles host a central wedge disclination that strongly influences their mechanical and catalytic properties. Yet the atomistic mechanisms governing the stability, migration, and annihilation of this topological defect remain incompletely understood. Here we present a systematic molecular dynamics study of gold Marks decahedra in which the fivefold axis is artificially brought close to the surface by controlled geometric modifications. By generating concave and convex morphologies with varying axis depth, we uncover a geometry-controlled competition between axis centering and detwinning. Concave geometries promote surface diffusion that restores fivefold symmetry, either by recentering the original disclination or by nucleating a new subsurface axis through collective atomic rearrangements. In contrast, convex structures with a shallow axis undergo rapid detwinning within the first nanoseconds via surface glide, leading to single-twin or fully FCC configurations. Remarkably, positioning the axis just two atomic layers beneath the surface suppresses detwinning and restores stability. Our results demonstrate that surface curvature and defect depth critically regulate disclination mobility and twin stability, providing a mechanistic framework to understand the structural evolution of multi-twinned nanoparticles and to guide the controlled design of defect-engineered nanomaterials.
summary:
五重孪晶金属纳米粒子具有中心楔形向错，强烈影响其机械和催化性能。然而，控制这种拓扑缺陷的稳定性、迁移和湮灭的原子机制仍不完全清楚。在这里，我们提出了金马克十面体的系统分子动力学研究，其中五重轴通过受控的几何修改人为地接近表面。通过生成具有不同轴深度的凹凸形态，我们发现了轴居中和解孪之间的几何控制竞争。凹几何形状促进表面扩散，通过使原始向错居中或通过集体原子重排形成新的地下轴来恢复五重对称性。相比之下，具有浅轴的凸结构通过表面滑动在第一纳秒内经历快速解孪，从而形成单孪晶或完全FCC配置。值得注意的是，将轴定位在表面下方仅两个原子层可以抑制解孪并恢复稳定性。

我们的结果表明，表面曲率和缺陷深度关键地调节向错迁移率和孪晶稳定性，为理解多孪晶纳米颗粒的结构演化并指导缺陷工程纳米材料的受控设计提供了一个机制框架。

title: Phase Boundaries of Bulk 2D Rhombi
abstract: We conducted replica exchange Monte Carlo simulations to investigate the phase diagram of identical hard rhombi systems in two dimensions. The rhombi shape varies from nearly square-like, as their minor angle a approaches 90 degrees, to needle-like, as it approaches 0 degrees. For angles near 90 degrees, we observe an isotropic fluid, a rhombatic fluid, a rotator phase, and a columnar space-filling structure with increasing density. Conversely, as a approaches 0 degrees, the results resemble the needle limit. Even for angles as small as a = 20 degrees, we still obtain isotropic, nematic, and rhombatic fluids before reaching a rhombic solid, but the nematic phase gains importance with decreasing a. At a approximately 60 degrees, aperiodic space-filling structures with long-range six-fold orientational symmetry dominate over periodic candidates such as the rhombic and rhombille. This aperiodic solid undergoes a melting process leading to a phase with quasi-long-range six-fold orientational symmetry, a hexatic fluid, before reaching the isotropic phase.
summary: 我们进行了副本交换蒙特卡罗模拟，以研究二维相同硬菱形系统的相图。菱形的形状从近乎正方形（当其短角α接近90度时）到针状（当其短角α接近0度时）变化。对于接近 90 度的角度，我们观察到各向同性流体、菱形流体、旋转相和密度增加的柱状空间填充结构。相反，当 a 接近 0 度时，结果类似于针极限。即使对于小至 a = 20 度的角度，在达到菱形固体之前我们仍然会获得各向同性、向列相和菱形流体，但随着 a 的减小，向列相变得越来越重要。在大约 60 度处，具有长程六重定向对称性的非周期性空间填充结构比菱形和菱形等周期性候选结构占主导地位。这种非周期性固体经历熔化过程，形成具有准长程六重取向对称性的相，即六方流体，然后达到各向同性相。

title: Random fine structure and polarized luminescence of triplet excitons in semiconductor nanocrystals
abstract: We present a theory of polarized photoluminescence of triplet excitons in semiconductor nanocrystal ensembles with the random fine structure contributed by the electron-hole exchange and carrier-nuclear hyperfine interactions. The interaction parameters are assumed to be normally and isotropically distributed. In particular, the exchange interaction is described by the Gaussian orthogonal ensemble of random matrices. The intensity of luminescence as well as the optical orientation and alignment are calculated as functions of the fine structure splitting parameters and the exciton lifetime. We have also analyzed the suppression of optical alignment and enhancement of optical orientation in an external longitudinal magnetic field.
summary: 我们提出了半导体纳米晶体集合体中三重态激子的偏振光致发光理论，该集合体具有由电子-空穴交换和载流子-核超精细相互作用贡献的随机精细结构。假设相互作用参数呈正态且各向同性分布。特别地，交换相互作用由随机矩阵的高斯正交系综来描述。发光强度以及光学取向和排列被计算为精细结构分裂参数和激子寿命的函数。我们还分析了外部纵向磁场中光学对准的抑制和光学取向的增强。

title: Rounded hard squares confined in a circle
abstract: Packing under confinement could generate rich ordered structures through entropic effects, which is a fundamental problem in condensed matter, biophysics and material science. The influence of confinement to the anisotropic hard particles--particularly regarding the emergence of topological defect structures--remains poorly understood. Recent studies have shown that granular rods confined within circular boundaries can cluster into square like super-particles, forming four disclinations. In this study, we employ Monte Carlo simulations in the NPT ensemble to investigate how circular confinement influences the ordered structures of rounded-corner hard-squares with varying roundness. At low roundness, the system forms an integrated cross-shaped domain with tetratic order and four +1/4 disclinations in the corners, along with some column shifts. As roundness increases, we found a new partition structure, where particles self-assemble into six domains separated by six +1/4 disclinations and a central -1/2 disclination. Our findings reveal that the interplay between confinement geometry and colloid shape can drive entropy governed structural transitions, offering new insights for the design of topological metamaterials.
summary:
限制下的堆积可以通过熵效应产生丰富的有序结构，这是凝聚态物质、生物物理学和材料科学中的一个基本问题。限制对各向异性硬颗粒的影响——特别是关于拓扑缺陷结构的出现——仍然知之甚少。最近的研究表明，限制在圆形边界内的粒状棒可以聚集成方形的超粒子，形成四个向错。在这项研究中，我们在 NPT 系综中采用蒙特卡洛模拟来研究圆形限制如何影响具有不同圆度的圆角硬方块的有序结构。在低圆度下，系统形成一个集成的十字形域，具有四阶和四个角上的 +1/4 向错，以及一些列移位。随着圆度的增加，我们发现了一种新的分区结构，其中粒子自组装成由六个 +1/4 向错和中心 -1/2 向错分隔的六个域。

我们的研究结果表明，限制几何形状和胶体形状之间的相互作用可以驱动熵控制的结构转变，为拓扑超材料的设计提供新的见解。

title: Active Growth Layer Induced by Micromechanical Feedback Shapes Proliferating Cell Collectives
abstract: Proliferating cell collectives often develop an active growth layer near their boundary that regulates expansion and morphology, as observed in systems ranging from bacterial biofilms to epithelial tissues and tumor spheroids. While such layers have been attributed to diverse mechanisms, their microscopic origin remains unclear in many situations. Here, we show that micromechanical feedback alone provides a minimal mechanism for their emergence. We introduce a particle-based model of non-motile proliferating cells in which growth is locally inhibited by compressive stress, coupling division to mechanical interactions and generating an active growth layer without biochemical regulation. An emergent mechanical length scale sets the extent of the proliferative region and controls the system's behavior across scales, governing growth dynamics, morphology and organizing internal stress and velocity fields. Coarse-graining the model yields a continuum description with no adjustable parameters, providing a microscopic foundation for existing approaches. When the colony expands into a passive environment, we observe and characterize fingering instabilities driven purely by mechanical feedback. We further establish a correspondence with nutrient-depletion models, providing a route to study the statistical properties of expanding fronts within a minimal microscopic framework.
summary:
增殖的细胞集体通常在其边界附近形成活跃的生长层，调节扩张和形态，正如在从细菌生物膜到上皮组织和肿瘤球体的系统中观察到的那样。虽然这些层被归因于不同的机制，但在许多情况下它们的微观起源仍不清楚。在这里，我们表明，微机械反馈本身就为它们的出现提供了最小的机制。我们引入了一种基于粒子的非运动增殖细胞模型，其中生长受到压应力、耦合分裂与机械相互作用的局部抑制，并在没有生化调节的情况下生成活跃的生长层。新兴的机械长度尺度设定了增殖区域的范围，并控制系统在尺度上的行为，控制生长动力学、形态并组织内部应力和速度场。粗粒度模型产生了没有可调整参数的连续描述，为现有方法提供了微观基础。

当群体扩展到被动环境时，我们观察并表征纯粹由机械反馈驱动的指法不稳定性。我们进一步建立了与营养消耗模型的对应关系，为研究最小微观框架内扩展锋面的统计特性提供了一条途径。

title: Emergence of a molecular quantum liquid in one dimension
abstract: We investigate the fate of a one-dimensional lattice superfluid formed by hard-core bosons, aka `atoms' (alternatively, a free spinless Fermi sea) subjected to nearest-neighbor attractive Hubbard-like interactions only in subgroups of two sites. The system, as expected, stabilizes a fluid of dimerized molecules at large attractive interactions. However, the composite molecules have an effective meek hopping scale and dominant repulsive interactions solely due to virtual quantum fluctuations. Interestingly, at an intermediate attractive potential, the system realizes a phase-separated region where the system is in an absorbing state. We show that this phase-separated region is due to an emergent attractive interaction between the dimers which leads to a local charge-density wave puddle where particles effectively cluster with local half-filling. Moreover the molecular superfluid gets spontaneously charge-ordered in the addition of an unpaired atom, reflecting the extreme sensitivity of the system to the existence of lone atoms. Using density-matrix renormalization group studies and effective low-energy Hamiltonians, we isolate the quantum processes to uncover the physics behind molecule formation in a strongly interacting one-dimensional system.
summary:
我们研究了由硬核玻色子形成的一维晶格超流体的命运，又名“原子”（或者自由无旋转的费米海），仅在两个位点的子群中受到最近邻吸引哈伯德相互作用。正如预期的那样，该系统在大吸引力相互作用下稳定了二聚分子的流体。然而，复合分子仅由于虚拟量子涨落而具有有效的温和跳跃尺度和占主导地位的排斥相互作用。有趣的是，在中间吸引势下，系统实现了相分离区域，系统处于吸收状态。我们表明，这个相分离区域是由于二聚体之间出现的吸引力相互作用导致局部电荷密度波坑，其中粒子有效地聚集并局部半填充。此外，分子超流体在添加不成对原子时会自发地进行电荷排序，这反映了系统对孤立原子存在的极端敏感性。

利用密度矩阵重整化群研究和有效的低能哈密顿量，我们分离出量子过程，以揭示强相互作用的一维系统中分子形成背后的物理原理。

title: Categorical Time-Reversal Symmetries
abstract: The classification of phases using categorical symmetries has greatly expanded the landscape of gapped and gapless phases. So far, however, these developments have largely been restricted to phases with unitary (higher-)categorical symmetries over $\mathbb{C}$. In this work, we incorporate anti-unitary symmetries, such as time-reversal symmetry $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$, and show that the relevant physical structures are naturally described by fusion categories over $\mathbb{R}$. A class of real fusion categories, which we call Galois-real fusion categories, provides the correct categorical model for anti-unitary symmetries. A simple example is the time-reversal symmetry $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$ itself. We discuss the basic structures of real fusion categories and present a range of examples, including the group-theoretical categories $(G^T)^{\omega}$ and $\mathsf{Rep}(G^T)$ associated to anti-linear groups $G^T$, as well as non-invertible time-reversal symmetries described by a real analogue of Tambara--Yamagami fusion categories. We then classify gapped phases enriched with anti-linear symmetries in terms of module categories over Galois-real fusion categories. We furthermore apply the categorical formulation to prove dualities (i.e. gauge or Morita equivalences) of anti-linear symmetries generated by gauging subgroups. Complementing this, we also develop a Symmetry Topological Field Theory (SymTFT) framework, in which Galois-real fusion categories arise as boundary conditions of a $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$-enriched SymTFT. Morita equivalent anti-linear symmetries are shown to arise as different boundaries of the same $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$-enriched SymTFT.
summary:
使用分类对称性对相进行分类极大地扩展了有间隙和无间隙相的范围。然而，到目前为止，这些进展很大程度上仅限于 $\mathbb{C}$ 上具有单一（更高）分类对称性的阶段。在这项工作中，我们结合了反酉对称性，例如时间反演对称性 $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$，并表明相关的物理结构可以通过 $\mathbb{R}$ 上的融合类别自然地描述。一类实融合范畴，我们称之为伽罗瓦实融合范畴，为反酉对称性提供了正确的分类模型。一个简单的例子是时间反演对称性 $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$ 本身。我们讨论真实融合类别的基本结构并提出一系列示例，包括与反线性群 $G^T$ 相关的群论类别 $(G^T)^{\omega}$ 和 $\mathsf{Rep}(G^T)$，以及由 Tambara-Yamagami 融合类别的真实模拟描述的不可逆时间反转对称性。然后，我们根据伽罗瓦实数融合类别的模块类别对富含反线性对称性的间隙相进行分类。

我们还应用分类公式来证明由计量子群生成的反线性对称性的对偶性（即规范或森田等价）。作为补充，我们还开发了对称拓扑场论（SymTFT）框架，其中伽罗瓦实数融合类别作为 $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$ 丰富的 SymTFT 的边界条件出现。 Morita 等效的反对线性对称性被证明是作为相同 $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$ 丰富的 SymTFT 的不同边界而出现的。

title: Uncovering the Microscopic Mechanism of Slow Dynamics in Quasiperiodic Many-Body Localized Systems
abstract: We study the number entropy and quasiparticle width in one-dimensional quasiperiodic many-body localized (MBL) systems and observe slow dynamics that have previously been investigated in detail only in random systems. In contrast, quasiperiodic systems exhibit more structured growth of both observables. We identify the modulation of the Rabi oscillation amplitude of single-particle hoppings as the mechanism underlying the slow growth even deep in the MBL regime. This quantum amplitude modulation and associated beats arise from the interaction between single-particle hopping processes at different positions in the chain. Interestingly, this mechanism is not weakened by increasing the distance between particles and is generic to many-body quantum systems. We develop an analytical model based on the aforementioned mechanism that explains the observed dynamics at all accessible timescales and provides a microscopic picture of the slow dynamics in the MBL regime. Our results are consistent with the stability of the MBL phase in the thermodynamic limit.
summary: 我们研究一维准周期多体定域（MBL）系统中的数熵和准粒子宽度，并观察以前仅在随机系统中详细研究的慢动力学。相比之下，准周期系统表现出两个可观测量的更加结构化的增长。我们将单粒子跳跃的拉比振荡幅度的调制确定为即使在 MBL 区域深处缓慢生长的机制。这种量子振幅调制和相关的节拍是由链中不同位置的单粒子跳跃过程之间的相互作用产生的。有趣的是，这种机制并不会因为增加粒子之间的距离而减弱，并且对于多体量子系统是通用的。我们基于上述机制开发了一个分析模型，该模型解释了在所有可访问的时间尺度上观察到的动力学，并提供了 MBL 体系中缓慢动力学的微观图景。我们的结果与 MBL 相在热力学极限下的稳定性一致。

title: Pentagonal PdTe2 Monolayer for Sustainable Solar-driven Hydrogen Production
abstract: This investigation demonstrates that the pentagonal PdTe2 (penta-PdTe2) monolayer is a highly tunable two-dimensional (2D) photocatalyst, characterized by the bandgap of 1.75 eV and high hole mobility. Using density functional theory calculations with the HSE06 functional, we show that tensile strain engineering (particularly at +2% and +3%) is essential for enabling spontaneous water splitting. At these strain values, the valence-band maximum and conduction-band maximum straddle the water redox potentials (H+/H2 and O2/H2O) in both acidic (pH=0) and neutral (pH=7) conditions. The monolayer's low hole effective mass facilitates rapid charge extraction, mitigating recombination and driving the oxygen evolution reaction (OER) more effectively than many hexagonal and pentagonal counterparts. The Gibbs free energy ({\Delta}G) pathways indicate that overpotentials for the hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) and OER are highly sensitive to mechanical deformation, specifically biaxial strain, through which +3% tensile strain, yielding an optimized balance of overpotentials of {\eta}HER = 0.70 V and {\eta}OER = 0.72 V at pH=7. Finally, integrating optical absorption with thermodynamic driving forces results in a Solar-to-Hydrogen (STH) efficiency of 20.40% at pH 7. This exceeds the performance of several previously reported 2D catalysts, positioning penta-PdTe2 as a superior candidate for sustainable, solar-driven hydrogen production.
summary:
这项研究表明，五边形 PdTe2 (penta-PdTe2) 单层是一种高度可调的二维 (2D) 光催化剂，具有 1.75 eV 的带隙和高空穴迁移率。使用 HSE06 泛函的密度泛函理论计算，我们表明拉伸应变工程（特别是 +2% 和 +3%）对于实现自发水分解至关重要。在这些应变值下，在酸性 (pH=0) 和中性 (pH=7) 条件下，价带最大值和导带最大值跨越水氧化还原电位（H+/H2 和 O2/H2O）。与许多六边形和五边形对应物相比，单层的低空穴有效质量有利于快速电荷提取、减轻复合并更有效地驱动析氧反应（OER）。吉布斯自由能 ({\Delta}G) 路径表明，析氢反应 (HER) 和 OER 的过电势对机械变形高度敏感，特别是双轴应变，通过 +3% 拉伸应变，在 pH=7 时产生 {\eta}HER = 0.70 V 和 {\eta}OER = 0.72 V 的过电势的优化平衡。

最后，将光学吸收与热力学驱动力相结合，在 pH 7 时太阳能制氢 (STH) 效率达到 20.40%。这超过了之前报道的几种 2D 催化剂的性能，使 penta-PdTe2 成为可持续、太阳能驱动制氢的优异候选者。

title: From Double Colloidal Networks to Core-Shell and Mixed Composites through Sequential Gelation
abstract: Multicomponent gel systems have garnered much interest due to their compelling mechanical properties in the past decade. Yet, some mechanisms associated with multicomponent gels, such as sequential gelation, have been explored primarily in the context of chemical nonreversible polymeric and protein gels than in physical reversible colloidal ones. In this study, we use mesoscale simulation techniques to model the sequential gelation of two-component colloidal systems whose components' interspecies and intraspecies electrostatic interactions can be modified independently. We show that by simply leveraging temporal control and interspecies interactions, we can construct markedly different networks; from double networks to mixed and core-shell composite structures of varying coarseness and heterogeneity natures. These findings present a compelling case for further exploration of multicomponent colloidal systems.
summary: 在过去的十年中，多组分凝胶系统因其引人注目的机械性能而引起了人们的广泛关注。然而，与多组分凝胶相关的一些机制，例如顺序凝胶化，主要在化学不可逆聚合物和蛋白质凝胶的背景下进行探索，而不是在物理可逆胶体凝胶中。在本研究中，我们使用介观模拟技术来模拟双组分胶体系统的顺序凝胶化，其组分的种间和种内静电相互作用可以独立修改。我们证明，通过简单地利用时间控制和种间相互作用，我们可以构建明显不同的网络；从双网络到具有不同粗糙度和异质性的混合结构和核壳复合结构。这些发现为进一步探索多组分胶体系统提供了令人信服的案例。

title: One-loop Amplitudes: String Methods, Infrared Regularization, and Automation
abstract: We calculate field theory loop amplitudes by string methods, applied to half-maximal 4-point one-loop graviton amplitudes. Infrared divergences are regulated similarly to soft-collinear effective field theory (SCET): new mass scales are introduced, here by higher-point kinematics. We use an analytically continued single-valued polylogarithm as generating function. The Feynman integrals for the new tensor structures are infrared finite. We provide code as a step towards automation.
summary: 我们通过弦方法计算场论环振幅，应用于半最大 4 点单环引力子振幅。红外发散的调节与软共线有效场理论 (SCET) 类似：引入了新的质量尺度，此处通过更高点的运动学。我们使用解析连续的单值多对数作为生成函数。新张量结构的费曼积分是红外有限的。我们提供代码作为迈向自动化的一步。

title: High energy scattering and null strings
abstract: We propose an instrinsic worldsheet description of the ultra-high energy regime of string scattering based on worldsheet symmetries. At very high energies, the fundamental string becomes tensionless and in flat target spacetimes, the worldsheet becomes a null surface. Tensionless null strings thus emerge and the worldsheet symmetries morph from two copies of the Virasoro algebra to the two dimensional (2d) conformal Carroll or equivalently the 3d Bondi-van der Burgh-Metzner-Sachs (BMS) algebra. Tensionless strings have three inequivalent vacua over which they can be constructed, leading to distinct quantum theories. High energy tensile strings naturally connect to null strings built on the so-called induced vacuum. Our principle goal in this paper is the construction of scattering amplitudes for null strings in the induced vacuum. We show that these amplitudes, constructed from worldsheet methods of the null string, coincide with the high energy limit of usual string amplitudes. A crucial part of our analysis is the construction of integrated vertex operators. This achieved by relying on lessons from the parent string theory and following the tensionless limit carefully. A striking feature of the null string is the blurring of differences between open and closed strings. We see this at the level of the amplitudes as well. We then focus on four-point amplitudes and recover all expected regimes including the Gross-Mende regime and the Regge limit. We finally comment on a new class of vertex operators which arise naturally only in the zero tension string. This reproduces all our earlier analyses when put onshell but also has hints of signatures beyond the perturbative tensile string.
summary:
我们提出了基于世界表对称性的弦散射超高能量状态的内在世界表描述。在非常高的能量下，基本弦变得无张力，并且在平坦的目标时空中，世界面变成零表面。因此，无张力空弦出现，世界面对称性从 Virasoro 代数的两个副本转变为二维 (2d) 共形卡罗尔或等效的 3d Bondi-van der Burgh-Metzner-Sachs (BMS) 代数。无张力弦具有三个不等价的真空，可以在其中构建它们，从而产生不同的量子理论。高能拉伸弦自然地连接到建立在所谓的感应真空上的零弦。我们本文的主要目标是构建感应真空中零弦的散射振幅。我们证明，这些振幅是根据空弦的世界表方法构建的，与通常弦振幅的高能量极限一致。我们分析的一个关键部分是集成顶点算子的构造。这是通过依靠母弦理论的经验教训并仔细遵循无张力极限来实现的。

空字符串的一个显着特征是开放字符串和封闭字符串之间的差异变得模糊。我们在振幅水平上也看到了这一点。然后，我们关注四点振幅并恢复所有预期状态，包括 Gross-Mende 状态和 Regge 极限。最后，我们评论一类新的顶点算子，它们仅在零张力弦中自然出现。这再现了我们之前在外壳上进行的所有分析，但也暗示了扰动拉伸弦之外的特征。

title: The connection between a classical vibrating drumhead and the masses of glueballs
abstract: The powerful techniques of holographic quantum chromodynamics (QCD) can be employed in the investigation of glueballs -- composite particles made solely of gluons, the strong nuclear force mediators. In particular, the so-called hardwall model yields predictions for the values of the masses of various glueball states, which are related to the solutions of the differential equations of the model. It turns out that those equations are essentially the same as the ones governing the vibrations of a circular membrane like that of a drumhead, which may serve as extra motivation for studying the dynamics of such an object as an undergraduate physics student.
summary: 全息量子色动力学 (QCD) 的强大技术可用于研究胶球——仅由强核力介体胶子构成的复合粒子。特别是，所谓的硬墙模型可以预测各种胶球状态的质量值，这些值与模型微分方程的解相关。事实证明，这些方程与控制鼓皮等圆形膜振动的方程本质上是相同的，这可能成为物理本科生研究此类物体动力学的额外动力。

title: The Lee-Yang model and its generalizations through the lens of long-range deformations
abstract: In two dimensions, the non-unitary class of conformal minimal models, $\mathcal{M}(2,2m+1)$, has been recently conjectured to arise as renormalization-group fixed points of scalar field theories with complex $i\varphi^{2m-1}$ interaction, $m\in \mathbb{N}$, $m\ge2$. We test a variation of this conjecture through the perturbative study of two separate long-range constructions based on respectively the minimal model and its potential Landau-Ginzburg formalism. For $m>2$, inconsistencies are found when subsequently relating both constructions. In contrast, the long-range Lee-Yang model, the $m=2$ case, is shown to be analogue to the long-range Ising model.
summary: 在二维中，非酉类共形最小模型 $\mathcal{M}(2,2m+1)$ 最近被推测为具有复杂 $i\varphi^{2m-1}$ 相互作用的标量场论的重正化群不动点，$m\in \mathbb{N}$、$m\ge2$。我们通过分别基于最小模型及其潜在的朗道-金茨堡形式主义的两个独立的远程构造的微扰研究来测试该猜想的变体。对于 $m>2$，在随后关联两个结构时会发现不一致。相比之下，远程 Lee-Yang 模型（$m=2$ 情况）与远程 Ising 模型类似。

title: Universality in Relativistic Spinning Particle Models
abstract: We establish an equivalence between massive spinning particle models in four spacetime dimensions coupled to electromagnetism or gravity, within the spin-magnitude-preserving sector. Four representative models in the literature are shown to describe exactly the same physics in their free and interacting theories: vector oscillator, spinor oscillator, spherical top, and massive twistor. The Bargmann-Michel-Telegdi (BMT) and quadrupolar Mathisson-Papapetrou-Dixon (QMPD) equations are derived in a model-independent fashion. This universal framework allows for incorporating higher spin multipole interactions as well. We establish the rigorous construction of the interacting theory of the spherical top model with emphasis on spin gauge invariance. Applications to black hole physics, conserved charges, and post-Newtonian or post-Minkowskian frameworks are discussed.
summary: 我们在自旋幅度保持区域内建立了与电磁或重力耦合的四个时空维度的大规模自旋粒子模型之间的等价性。文献中的四种代表性模型在其自由和相互作用的理论中描述了完全相同的物理现象：矢量振子、旋量振子、球顶和质量扭量。 Bargmann-Michel-Telegdi (BMT) 和四极 Mathisson-Papapetrou-Dixon (QMPD) 方程以与模型无关的方式导出。这种通用框架还允许合并更高自旋的多极相互作用。我们建立了球顶模型相互作用理论的严格构造，重点是自旋规范不变性。讨论了黑洞物理、守恒电荷以及后牛顿或后闵可夫斯基框架的应用。

title: One-loop finiteness in higher-derivative $6D$, ${\cal N}=(1,0)$ super Yang-Mills -- hypermultiplet system
abstract: We employ the harmonic superspace methods to study a six-dimensional $\mathcal{N}=(1,0)$ supersymmetric gauge theory with higher derivatives coupled to a hypermultiplet in the adjoint representation. By introducing a novel non-minimal interaction between the gauge multiplet and the hypermultiplet, we demonstrate that the one-loop divergences in gauge superfield sector, which are present in the conventional formulation, are canceled. The resulting theory is off-shell one-loop finite in this sector, while preserving the gauge invariance and $\mathcal{N}=(1,0)$ supersymmetry. The cancelation mechanism is explicitly verified using both the background field method and the supergraph techniques. Thus, we present an example of the higher-derivative supersymmetric gauge theory in six dimensions which is finite in the vector multiplet sector.
summary: 我们采用调和超空间方法来研究六维 $\mathcal{N}=(1,0)$ 超对称规范理论，其高阶导数耦合到伴随表示中的超多重态。通过引入规范多重态和超多重态之间的一种新颖的非最小相互作用，我们证明了常规公式中存在的规范超场扇区的单环发散被消除了。由此产生的理论在该扇区中是离壳单环有限的，同时保留了规范不变性和 $\mathcal{N}=(1,0)$ 超对称性。使用背景场​​方法和超图技术明确验证了取消机制。因此，我们提出了一个在向量多重态扇区内有限的六维高导数超对称规范理论的例子。

title: Higher descent equations based on 2-term $L_{\infty}$ algebras
abstract: In this paper, we develop the higher descent equations for higher gauge theories within the framework of 2-term $L_{\infty}$ algebras. Starting from a multilinear symmetric invariant polynomial, we construct a family of higher Chern-Simons type characteristic classes and verify that they satisfy the higher descent equations. These polynomials encode both the higher Chern-Weil theorem and the higher gauge anomalies.
summary: 在本文中，我们在两项 $L_{\infty}$ 代数的框架内开发了高规范理论的高下降方程。从多线性对称不变多项式开始，我们构造了一系列更高的 Chern-Simons 类型特征类，并验证它们满足更高的下降方程。这些多项式编码了更高的陈-韦尔定理和更高的规范异常。

title: Instability in ${\cal N}=4$ supersymmetric Yang-Mills theory on $S^3$ at finite density
abstract: Homogeneous and isotropic equilibrium states of strongly coupled ${\cal N}=4$ supersymmetric Yang-Mills charged plasma in ${\mathbb R}^3$ with equal chemical potentials for the maximal Abelian subgroup of the $R$-symmetry group become dynamically unstable below some critical temperature. The instabilities arise in the $R$-symmetry charge transport, precisely when the equilibrium state becomes thermodynamically unstable. We study the fate these correlated instabilities when the theory is place on $S^3$. The curvature of the three-sphere affects the onset of the dynamical and the thermodynamic instabilities differently: increasing the curvature at low temperatures can stabilize its transport, but leave the plasma thermodynamically unstable. Thermodynamic stability is eventually recovered at large curvatures.
summary: ${\mathbb R}^3$ 中强耦合 ${\cal N}=4$ 超对称杨米尔斯带电等离子体的均质和各向同性平衡态，对于 $R$ 对称群的最大阿贝尔子群具有相等的化学势，在低于某个临界温度时变得动态不稳定。当平衡状态变得热力学不稳定时，$R$对称电荷传输就会出现不稳定性。当理论置于 $S^3$ 上时，我们研究这些相关不稳定性的命运。三球体的曲率对动力学和热力学不稳定性的开始产生不同的影响：在低温下增加曲率可以稳定其传输，但会使等离子体热力学不稳定。热力学稳定性最终在大曲率下恢复。

title: Emergent strings, holography, and cosmology from four-fermion interactions: a bottom-up derivation of AdS/CFT, dS/CFT, and $w_{1+\infty}$
abstract: We derive holographic duality from first principles starting from the $(1+1)$-dimensional Gross-Neveu (GN) model with $N$ fermion species and a local quartic interaction, without assuming any string or geometric input. Using a Bargmann-Wigner scheme, the competition between chiral condensation $\Delta_0=\langle\bar\psi\psi\rangle$ and spin-1 pairing $\Delta_1=\langle\bar\Phi_1\Phi_1\rangle$ defines an emergent radial coordinate $z=m^{-1}(\Delta_1/\Delta_0^2-1)^{1/2}$; local fluctuations of this ratio, tracked by a comoving derivative, generate the AdS$_3$ line element via the enhanced large-$N$ species dispersion; the condensate competition \emph{is} the extra dimension. From this single mechanism the complete AdS$_3$/CFT$_2$ correspondence emerges: Newton's constant, the Virasoro algebra ($c=2N^2$), D1-branes with open strings, open/closed T-duality, the Hagedorn/BKT transition, and the BTZ black hole whose horizon circumference is quantised in Planck units by individual vortex nucleation events. Analytic continuation $z\to i\zeta$ across the chiral critical point realises the Strominger dS/CFT conjecture microscopically. Six constraints identify the emergent string as Type IIB on AdS$_3\times S^3\times\mathcal{M}_4$, with emergent worldsheet $\mathcal{N}=(1,1)$ supersymmetry, NS/R spectral flow, and GSO projection. Extension to the $(2+1)$d NJL model yields AdS$_4$/CFT$_3$, a dS$_4$/CFT$_3$ realisation, and a structural identification of the $w_{1+\infty}$ celestial algebra. Extension to the $(3+1)$d NJL model yields AdS$_5$/CFT$_4$ and holographic QCD with chiral symmetry breaking and linear Regge trajectories $M_s^2=4(s+1)\Lambda_\mathrm{QCD}^2$, capturing the correct QCD infrared physics from a four-fermion interaction.
summary:
我们从具有 $N$ 费米子种类和局部四次相互作用的 $(1+1)$ 维 Gross-Neveu (GN) 模型开始，从第一原理推导出全息对偶性，而不假设任何字符串或几何输入。使用 Bargmann-Wigner 方案，手性缩合 $\Delta_0=\langle\bar\psi\psi\rangle$ 和 spin-1 配对 $\Delta_1=\langle\bar\Phi_1\Phi_1\rangle$ 之间的竞争定义了一个紧急径向坐标 $z=m^{-1}(\Delta_1/\Delta_0^2-1)^{1/2}$；该比率的局部波动由共动导数跟踪，通过增强的大$N$物种分散度生成AdS$_3$线元素；凝聚竞争\emph{是}额外维度。从这个单一机制中，出现了完整的 AdS$_3$/CFT$_2$ 对应关系：牛顿常数、Virasoro 代数 ($c=2N^2$)、具有开弦的 D1-膜、开/闭 T-对偶性、Hgedorn/BKT 跃迁以及 BTZ 黑洞，其视界周长由单个涡旋成核事件以普朗克单位量化。跨手性临界点的解析延拓 $z\to i\zeta$ 在微观上实现了 Strominger dS/CFT 猜想。

六个约束将 AdS$_3\times S^3\times\mathcal{M}_4$ 上的突现串识别为类型 IIB，并具有突现世界表 $\mathcal{N}=(1,1)$ 超对称性、NS/R 谱流和 GSO 投影。 $(2+1)$d NJL 模型的扩展产生 AdS$_4$/CFT$_3$、dS$_4$/CFT$_3$ 实现以及 $w_{1+\infty}$ 天体代数的结构识别。扩展到 $(3+1)$d NJL 模型会产生 AdS$_5$/CFT$_4$ 和具有手性对称破缺和线性 Regge 轨迹 $M_s^2=4(s+1)\Lambda_\mathrm{QCD}^2$ 的全息 QCD，从四费米子相互作用中捕获正确的 QCD 红外物理。

title: On the trivalent junction of three non-tachyonic heterotic string theories
abstract: Recently, Altavista, Anastasi, Angius and Uranga discussed a method to construct junctions and bouquets of different perturbative string theories. Following this analysis, we here argue that three non-tachyonic ten-dimensional heterotic string theories can be joined together at a nine-dimensional junction. This is done by creating a two-dimensional non-conformal $\mathcal{N}{=}(0,1)$ supersymmetric quantum field theory with three asymptotic ends, each equipped with one of the worldsheet theories of the supersymmetric $E_8\times E_8$ theory, the supersymmetric $SO(32)$ theory, and the non-supersymmetric $SO(16)\times SO(16)$ theory, respectively. It is actually a special case of a more general construction involving an arbitrary $\mathbb{Z}_2$-symmetric theory $T$, its $\mathbb{Z}_2$-orbifold $T/\mathbb{Z}_2$, and the modified $\mathbb{Z}_2$-orbifold $(T\times q)/\mathbb{Z}_2$, where $q$ is a certain $\mathbb{Z}_2$-symmetric spin invertible theory.
summary: 最近，Altavista、Anastasi、Angius 和 Uranga 讨论了一种构造不同微扰弦理论的结点和花束的方法。根据这一分析，我们在这里认为三个非快子十维异质弦理论可以在九维连接处连接在一起。这是通过创建具有三个渐近端的二维非共形 $\mathcal{N}{=}(0,1)$ 超对称量子场论来完成的，每个端分别配备超对称 $E_8\times E_8$ 理论、超对称 $SO(32)$ 理论和非超对称 $SO(16)\times SO(16)$ 理论的世界表理论之一。它实际上是更一般结构的特例，涉及任意 $\mathbb{Z}_2$-对称理论 $T$、其 $\mathbb{Z}_2$-orbifold $T/\mathbb{Z}_2$ 和修改后的 $\mathbb{Z}_2$-orbifold $(T\times q)/\mathbb{Z}_2$，其中 $q$ 是某个$\mathbb{Z}_2$-对称自旋可逆理论。

title: Universal Modular Properties of Generalized Gibbs Ensembles and Chiral Deformations
abstract: We study modular properties of conformal field theories perturbed by holomorphic fields. We prove an asymptotic formula for the modular S-transform of a generalized partition function that includes zero modes of higher spin holomorphic currents. The derivation makes use of general properties of torus correlation functions, in particular the Zhu recursion relation. The asymptotic expansion of the modular transformed partition function takes a universal form that is determined iteratively by the second order pole coefficients in the operator product expansion of the holomorphic currents. This proves and generalizes a conjecture regarding the modular transformation properties of generalized Gibbs ensembles.
summary: 我们研究受全纯场扰动的共形场论的模性质。我们证明了广义配分函数的模 S 变换的渐近公式，其中包括更高自旋全纯电流的零模式。该推导利用了环面相关函数的一般性质，特别是朱递归关系。模变换配分函数的渐近展开采用通用形式，该形式由全纯电流的算子乘积展开中的二阶极点系数迭代确定。这证明并推广了关于广义吉布斯系综的模变换性质的猜想。

title: A Twisted Origin for Magnetic Carroll Supersymmetry
abstract: Magnetic Carrollian theories provide a natural setting for field theories with nontrivial spatial structure in the Carroll limit and are therefore natural candidates for flat-space holographic duals. Embedding such boundary theories into a top-down framework requires a consistent supersymmetric completion and, in particular, an understanding of the relativistic origin of magnetic Carroll supersymmetry. We show that the relevant magnetic Carroll algebra does not arise from a naive contraction of the standard relativistic supersymmetry algebra, but instead descends from a twisted relativistic parent. As an explicit realization, we construct a three-dimensional ${\mathcal{N}}=2$ magnetic Carroll algebra together with a supersymmetric vector-multiplet action. Unlike the electric case, the resulting structure contains one supercharge that squares to spatial momentum, a mixed anticommutator that yields the Hamiltonian, and a nilpotent second supercharge. We further show that its conformal extension coincides with the global part of a supersymmetric BMS$_4$ algebra. This provides a physical and relativistic origin for a super-BMS$_4$ structure recently identified by complementary algebraic methods, and strengthens the case for magnetic Carroll theories in flat-space holography and supersymmetric asymptotic symmetries.
summary:
磁卡罗尔理论为在卡罗尔极限内具有非平凡空间结构的场论提供了自然的背景，因此是平坦空间全息对偶的自然候选者。将这种边界理论嵌入到自上而下的框架中需要一致的超对称完成，特别是对磁卡罗尔超对称性的相对论起源的理解。我们证明，相关的磁卡罗尔代数并非源自标准相对论超对称代数的朴素收缩，而是源自扭曲的相对论母体。作为显式实现，我们构造了一个三维 ${\mathcal{N}}=2$ 磁卡罗尔代数以及超对称向量多重作用。与电情况不同，所得结构包含一个与空间动量平方的增压、一个产生哈密顿量的混合反换向器和一个幂零的第二个增压。我们进一步表明，它的共形扩展与超对称 BMS$_4$ 代数的全局部分一致。

这为最近通过互补代数方法识别的超级 BMS$_4$ 结构提供了物理和相对论起源，并强化了平坦空间全息术和超对称渐近对称中磁卡罗尔理论的情况。

title: Oscillons in the broken vacuum and global vortex annihilation
abstract: In contrast to the complex $\phi^4$ model, vortex-antivortex collisions in the complex $\phi^6$ theory reveal a resonant structure due to the existence of a remarkably stable, long-lived, large amplitude oscillon in the broken vacuum. Surprisingly, it persists despite the absence of a mass gap associated with the flat direction in the broken vacuum. We demonstrate that its existence is related to a far-distance modification of the potential, namely, the appearance of an unbroken (false or true) vacuum.
summary: 与复杂的$\phi^4$模型相反，复杂的$\phi^6$理论中的涡旋-反涡旋碰撞揭示了由于破碎真空中存在非常稳定、长寿命、大幅度的振荡而产生的共振结构。令人惊讶的是，尽管破碎真空中不存在与平面方向相关的质量间隙，但它仍然存在。我们证明它的存在与势的远距离修改有关，即不间断（假或真）真空的出现。

title: Physics as Code: From Scans to Theorems with ITP APIs in $SU(5)$ Model Building
abstract: A recurring challenge in theoretical physics is to make reliable global statements about bounded but combinatorially large model spaces. Exhaustive scans quickly become opaque or impractical, while statistical exploration does not by itself provide theorem-backed guarantees. This motivates workflows in which the model-building problem itself is formalized inside an interactive theorem prover (ITP). In this paper we develop an API-based methodology for formalizing such bounded model-building questions inside Lean, an interactive theorem prover. The central step is to represent the relevant charge spectra, predicates, and reduction moves as reusable ITP definitions, and then to derive the classification from proved reduction theorems rather than from an ad hoc scan. We demonstrate the strategy in a concrete $SU(5)$ case study motivated by F-theory model building with additional Abelian symmetries. At the charge-spectrum layer, we classify bounded spectra that admit a top-quark Yukawa coupling, avoid a selected set of dangerous operators, and satisfy a minimal charge-spectrum completeness condition. Our main result shows that every such spectrum in the bounded search space arises from finitely many minimal top-Yukawa witnesses together with controlled completions and certified closure steps. This classification represents a formally verified description of the full viable class in the charge-spectrum setting studied here. The development is implemented inside PhysLib as reusable infrastructure rather than as a one-off verification script. It provides a proof of principle for how interactive theorem provers can turn combinatorially difficult model-building problems into correctness-first, reusable workflows, and we discuss how the resulting certified classification can serve as reliable input for downstream analyses.
summary:
理论物理学中反复出现的挑战是对有界但组合大的模型空间做出可靠的全局陈述。详尽的扫描很快就会变得不透明或不切实际，而统计探索本身并不能提供有定理支持的保证。这激发了模型构建问题本身在交互式定理证明器 (ITP) 中形式化的工作流程。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于 API 的方法，用于在 Lean（一种交互式定理证明器）中形式化此类有界模型构建问题。中心步骤是将相关电荷谱、谓词和还原移动表示为可重复使用的 ITP 定义，然后从已证明的还原定理而不是从临时扫描中导出分类。我们在一个具体的 $SU(5)$ 案例研究中演示了该策略，该案例研究的动机是建立具有附加阿贝尔对称性的 F 理论模型。在电荷谱层，我们对有界谱进行分类，这些有界谱允许顶夸克汤川耦合，避免一组选定的危险算子，并满足最小电荷谱完整性条件。

我们的主要结果表明，有界搜索空间中的每个此类频谱都来自有限多个最小的顶级 Yukawa 见证以及受控完成和经过认证的关闭步骤。该分类代表了对此处研究的电荷谱设置中完整可行类别的正式验证的描述。该开发是在 PhysLib 内部作为可重用基础设施实现的，而不是作为一次性验证脚本。它为交互式定理证明者如何将组合困难的模型构建问题转化为正确性第一、可重用的工作流程提供了原理证明，并且我们讨论了所得的经过认证的分类如何作为下游分析的可靠输入。

title: Lecture Notes on Positivity Properties of Scattering Amplitudes
abstract: We review completely monotone (CM) and Stieltjes functions, which are classes of functions obeying an infinite hierarchy of positivity constraints. While these are classical concepts in analysis, such properties have recently been shown to arise in many fundamental building blocks and observables of quantum field theory (QFT), including scalar Feynman integrals in the Euclidean region and Coulomb branch amplitudes in $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM. After reviewing their mathematical structure, we discuss the physical and geometric origins of these properties, ranging from unitarity and analyticity in scattering amplitudes to the structure of parametric representations of Feynman integrals. We then survey a number of applications, including constraints on the analytic S-matrix, implications for numerical bootstrap methods, and connections to positive geometry, where we present evidence for a close relation between these functions and geometric volume interpretations. These notes are based on an extended series of lectures delivered at the \emph{Positive Geometry in Scattering Amplitudes and Cosmological Correlators} workshop, held at the International Centre for Theoretical Sciences (ICTS), Bengaluru, in February 2025.
summary:
我们回顾完全单调（CM）函数和 Stieltjes 函数，它们是服从无限层次的正性约束的函数类。虽然这些是分析中的经典概念，但这些性质最近已被证明出现在量子场论（QFT）的许多基本构建块和可观测量中，包括欧几里得区域中的标量费曼积分和 $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM 中的库仑分支振幅。在回顾了它们的数学结构之后，我们讨论了这些属性的物理和几何起源，从散射幅度的幺正性和解析性到费曼积分的参数表示的结构。然后，我们调查了许多应用，包括解析 S 矩阵的约束、数值引导方法的含义以及与正几何的联系，其中我们提供了这些函数和几何体积解释之间密切关系的证据。

这些笔记基于 2025 年 2 月在班加罗尔国际理论科学中心 (ICTS) 举办的 \emph{散射振幅和宇宙学相关器中的正几何}研讨会上发表的一系列扩展讲座。

title: Supersymmetry and Attractors in N = 4 Supergravity
abstract: In this paper, we study the attractor mechanism for extremal, spherically symmetric black holes in pure N = 4 Poincaré supergravity, which we demonstrate numerically. We further study the supersymmetries preserved by these solutions by focussing specifically on the constant moduli solutions and show that, for a generic dyonic charge configuration satisfying $p^2q^2>(p.q)^2$, they always preserve 1/4th of the total supersymmetries.
summary: 在本文中，我们研究了纯 N = 4 庞加莱超引力中极值球对称黑洞的吸引子机制，并通过数值证明了这一机制。我们通过专门关注恒模解来进一步研究这些解所保留的超对称性，并表明，对于满足 $p^2q^2>(p.q)^2$ 的通用动态电荷配置，它们始终保留总超对称性的 1/4。

title: Which Functions Admit a Positive Geometry? From Branch Cuts to String Amplitudes
abstract: Positive geometry provides a geometric framework where physical observables are encoded as canonical forms associated to regions of kinematic space. In this paper we consider a generalisation to an infinite union of line segments, which allows us to capture canonical forms beyond rational functions. In the continuum limit of positive geometries, we show that we can generalise even further and describe positive geometries whose canonical forms contain branch cuts. We will constrain which functions can be obtained as the canonical form of one-dimensional positive geometries. We introduce the notion of the pseudogenus to classify meromorphic functions, and show that canonical forms can be written as the $\mathrm d\log$ of a function with pseudogenus zero. Furthermore, we argue that the spectrum encoded by a union of line segments is consistent with the presence of a stringy tower of states or a Kaluza-Klein tower with three or more compact directions only if nearly all such states do not contribute to the scattering amplitude. In addition, we show how the d log of both open and closed string amplitudes admits a positive geometry. This allows us to give a fully geometric interpretation for the KLT double copy at four points.
summary:
正几何提供了一个几何框架，其中物理可观测量被编码为与运动空间区域相关的规范形式。在本文中，我们考虑对线段的无限联合的推广，这使我们能够捕获有理函数之外的规范形式。在正几何的连续极限中，我们表明我们可以进一步概括并描述其规范形式包含分支切割的正几何。我们将限制哪些函数可以获得作为一维正几何的规范形式。我们引入伪属的概念来对亚纯函数进行分类，并证明规范形式可以写成伪属为零的函数的$\mathrm d\log$。此外，我们认为，只有当几乎所有这些状态都对散射幅度没有贡献时，由线段并集编码的光谱才与状态的拉丝塔或具有三个或更多紧凑方向的卡鲁扎-克莱因塔的存在一致。此外，我们还展示了开弦和闭弦振幅的 d 对数如何允许正几何。

这使我们能够在四个点处对 KLT 双副本给出完全的几何解释。

title: Symmetry Resolved Entanglement Entropy: Equipartition under Driven and Non-unitary Evolution in a Compact Boson CFT
abstract: We study the evolution of symmetry-resolved entanglement entropy in bulk-driven Floquet conformal field theories (CFTs). Focusing on the two-dimensional free compact boson CFT, we analyze how symmetry-resolved Rényi entropies approach or depart from equipartition among charge sectors. We show that the existence of an $\mathfrak{sl}^{(k)}(2,\mathbb{R})$ subalgebra of the Virasoro algebra introduces a free parameter, the label $k$, which allows us to control the breakdown of equipartition. We argue that this effect originates from an explicit coupling between low- and high-frequency modes. Based on a general oscillator representation of the Virasoro algebra, we expect this mechanism to persist beyond the free boson CFT. Finally, we discuss how the real-time dynamics of fine-grained symmetry-resolved entropies of a boundary state are modified under non-unitary evolution, which can be associated with post-selected weak measurements.
summary: 我们研究了体驱动 Floquet 共形场理论 (CFT) 中对称分辨纠缠熵的演化。我们关注二维自由紧致玻色子 CFT，分析对称解析的 Rényi 熵如何接近或偏离电荷扇区之间的均分。我们证明了 Virasoro 代数的 $\mathfrak{sl}^{(k)}(2,\mathbb{R})$ 子代数的存在引入了一个自由参数，标签 $k$，它允许我们控制均分的分解。我们认为这种效应源于低频和高频模式之间的显式耦合。基于 Virasoro 代数的一般振荡器表示，我们预计这种机制将在自由玻色子 CFT 之外持续存在。最后，我们讨论了如何在非酉演化下修改边界态细粒度对称分辨熵的实时动态，这可以与后选择的弱测量相关。

title: 3D gravity and double copy theory
abstract: We introduce a novel reformulation of three-dimensional gravity in terms of divergenceless vector frames, inspired by the double copy for Chern-Simons theory. This formulation is on-shell equivalent to conventional 3D gravity and provides a transparent geometric interpretation of the double-copy construction. We relate the resulting theory to a Chern-Simons-like action, propose a higher-dimensional origin, and explore extensions that give rise to $AdS_3$
summary: 受到陈-西蒙斯理论双拷贝的启发，我们引入了一种用无散向量框架对三维引力进行新颖的重新表述。该公式在壳上相当于传统的 3D 重力，并为双拷贝结构提供了透明的几何解释。我们将由此产生的理论与 Chern-Simons 式的行为联系起来，提出一个更高维度的起源，并探索产生 $AdS_3$ 的扩展

title: Scattering in strong field QED in a non-null background
abstract: We examine scattering amplitudes for an arbitrary number of photons in a class of non-null background electromagnetic fields, studying tree-level and one-loop amplitudes in scalar and spinor quantum-electrodynamics in backgrounds defined by a gauge field $A_{\mu}(\mathfrak{n}\cdot x)$ for $\mathfrak{n}^2\neq 0$. Motivated to account for more physically realistic laser-plasma dispersive properties, our approach overcomes prior work studying such amplitudes in a constant background field and relaxes the familiar null criterion assumed for plane waves. Master Formulae for the $N$-photon amplitudes dressed by the non-null background are constructed using the first-quantised worldline formalism, which can systematically account for all orders in the non-null parameter, $\mathfrak{n}^2$, treated here as an expansion parameter. These are derived from worldline representations of the coordinate and momentum space propagators (and their LSZ-truncated amplitudes) and the effective action, each incorporating the non-null background non-perturbatively. We then outline a partial resummation of their expansions in $\mathfrak{n}^{2}$. A special exactly solvable case of non-null constant crossed fields without photon insertion in the effective action is explored to test the Master Formulae that result. The validity of the presented master formulae is further checked against known expressions for the wavefunction and non-linear Compton scattering in a non-null background to lowest order in the non-null parameter.
summary:
我们检查一类非零背景电磁场中任意数量光子的散射振幅，研究由规范场 $A_{\mu}(\mathfrak{n}\cdot x)$ 定义的背景中标量和旋量量子电动力学中的树级和单环振幅，其中 $\mathfrak{n}^2\neq 0$。为了考虑更物理上真实的激光等离子体色散特性，我们的方法克服了先前在恒定背景场中研究此类振幅的工作，并放宽了为平面波假设的熟悉的零准则。非空背景修饰的 $N$ 光子振幅的主公式是使用第一量化世界线形式主义构建的，它可以系统地解释非空参数 $\mathfrak{n}^2$ 中的所有阶数，此处将其视为展开参数。这些源自坐标和动量空间传播器（及其 LSZ 截断幅度）和有效动作的世界线表示，每个都非扰动地包含非零背景。然后我们在 $\mathfrak{n}^{2}$ 中概述了它们扩展的部分恢复。

探索了一种特殊的完全可解的情况，即在有效作用中没有光子插入的非空常数交叉场，以测试所产生的主公式。所提出的主公式的有效性进一步对照波函数的已知表达式和非零背景中的非线性康普顿散射到非零参数的最低阶进行检查。

title: Symmetry analysis and exact solutions of multi-layer quasi-geostrophic problem
abstract: We carry out an extended symmetry analysis of the multi-layer quasi-geostrophic problem. This model is given by a system of an arbitrary number of coupled barotropic vorticity equations. Conservation laws and a Hamiltonian structure for the general case of the model are correctly described for the first time. Using original methods, we compute the maximal Lie invariance algebra and the complete point-symmetry pseudogroup of the model. After classifying one- and two-dimensional subalgebras of the Lie invariance algebra, we exhaustively study codimension-one, -two and -three Lie reductions. Notably, among invariant submodels of the original nonlinear model, we obtain uncoupled systems of well-known linear equations, including the Helmholtz, modified Helmholtz, Laplace, Klein-Gordon, Whittaker, Bessel and linearized Benjamin-Bona-Mahony equations. Integration of these systems significantly depends on spectral properties of the model's vertical coupling matrix, which we also revisit in detail. As a result, we construct wide families of exact solutions, including rediscovered representations of stationary and travelling baroclinic Rossby waves, coherent baroclinic eddies, hetons and localized dipolar vortices. We illustrate the physical relevance of obtained solutions using real-world geophysical data for a three-layer ocean model.
summary:
我们对多层准地转问题进行了扩展对称性分析。该模型由任意数量的耦合正压涡度方程组给出。首次正确描述了模型一般情况的守恒定律和哈密顿结构。使用原始方法，我们计算模型的最大李不变代数和完整的点对称伪群。在对李不变代数的一维和二维子代数进行分类之后，我们详尽地研究了余维一、二和三维李约简。值得注意的是，在原始非线性模型的不变子模型中，我们获得了著名线性方程的非耦合系统，包括亥姆霍兹方程、修正亥姆霍兹方程、拉普拉斯方程、克莱因-戈登方程、惠特克方程、贝塞尔方程和线性化本杰明-博纳-马洪尼方程。这些系统的集成很大程度上取决于模型垂直耦合矩阵的光谱特性，我们也详细回顾了这一点。

因此，我们构建了广泛的精确解，包括重新发现的静止和行进斜压罗斯贝波、相干斜压涡流、重子和局域偶极涡旋的表示。我们使用三层海洋模型的真实地球物理数据来说明所获得的解决方案的物理相关性。

title: Semiclassical shape resonances for magnetic Stark Hamiltonians
abstract: We study shape resonances of two-dimensional magnetic Stark Hamiltonians in the semiclassical limit. The magnetic field is assumed to be constant and the scalar potential is a perturbation of a linear potential. Under the assumption that the scalar potential has potential wells, the existence of a one-to-one correspondence between shape resonances of the Hamiltonian and discrete eigenvalues of a certain reference operator is proved. This implies the Weyl law for the number of resonances and the asymptotic behavior of the real parts of resonances near the bottom of a potential well. Resonances are studied as complex eigenvalues of complex distorted Hamiltonians, which is defined by the complex translation outside a compact set.
summary: 我们研究半经典极限下二维磁斯塔克哈密顿量的形状共振。假设磁场是恒定的，标量势是线性势的扰动。在标量势存在势阱的假设下，证明了哈密顿量的形状共振与某个参考算子的离散特征值之间存在一一对应关系。这意味着共振数量的韦尔定律以及势阱底部附近共振实部的渐近行为。共振被研究为复扭曲哈密顿量的复特征值，其由紧集之外的复平移来定义。

title: Quantum Hall States response to toroidal geometry deformation
abstract: In this paper, we apply techniques of geometric quantization to study the response of the integer and fractional quantum Hall effects to toroidal geometry deformation. The main method is that of using complex time Hamiltonian evolution to induce the geometry change and then the associated generalized coherent state transforms (gCST) to find the evolution of the Laughlin states. We consider two kinds of deformations. The first are flat toroidal deformations. Although Laughlin states for all flat toroidal geometries have been thoroughly studied before, we believe that our approach via the gCST is novel. It also serves as a testing ground to study the non-flat Kähler deformations. The Hamiltonians used in the flat deformations are quadratic in the generators of translations and therefore non periodic. The second kind of deformations involve nonflat Kähler toroidal deformations, generated by global, thus bi-periodic, Hamiltonians on the torus. The corresponding imaginary time flows are (elliptic curve modulus) $\tau$-preserving Mabuchi geodesics in the space of Kähler metrics on the torus, hitting a curvature singularity in finite imaginary time. By restricting to $S^1$-invariant deformations we find explicit analytic expressions for the evolution of the toroidal geometry and of the Laughlin states all the way to the singularity.
summary:
在本文中，我们应用几何量化技术来研究整数和分数量子霍尔效应对环形几何变形的响应。主要方法是使用复时间哈密顿演化来引起几何变化，然后使用相关的广义相干态变换（gCST）来找到劳克林态的演化。我们考虑两种变形。第一种是扁平环形变形。尽管之前已经对所有平面环形几何形状的 Laughlin 状态进行了深入研究，但我们相信我们通过 gCST 的方法是新颖的。它还可以作为研究非平坦卡勒变形的试验场。平面变形中使用的哈密顿量在平移生成元中是二次的，因此是非周期性的。第二种变形涉及非平坦的凯勒环形变形，由环面上的全局（因此是双周期）哈密顿量生成。相应的虚时间流是（椭圆曲线模数）$\tau$ - 在环面上的凯勒度量空间中保留 Mabuchi 测地线，在有限虚时间中达到曲率奇点。

通过限制 $S^1$ 不变变形，我们找到了环形几何和劳克林态一直到奇点演化的明确解析表达式。

title: The Full Set of KMS-States for Abelian Kitaev Models
abstract: We first prove that the subalgebra $\mathcal{C}$ generated by the vertex and face operators of an abelian Kitaev model is a $C^\ast$-diagonal of the UHF algebra $\mathcal{A}$ of quasilocal observables. This gives us access to the Weyl groupoid $\mathcal{G}_\mathcal{C}$ associated with the $C^\ast$-inclusion $\mathcal{C} \hookrightarrow \mathcal{A}$, which supplies a valuable presentation of $\mathcal{A}$ as a groupoid $C^\ast$-algebra where the dynamics of the model are generated by a groupoid 1-cocycle $c_H$. Making appeal to the notion of $(c_H,\beta)$-KMS measures for this groupoid, we identify the full set of KMS states of the model and prove its uniqueness for $\beta \in [0,\infty)$. Furthermore, we show that its limit at $\beta \rightarrow \infty$ exists and coincides with the unique frustration-free ground state of the model.
summary: 我们首先证明由阿贝尔 Kitaev 模型的顶点和面算子生成的子代数 $\mathcal{C}$ 是拟局部可观测量的 UHF 代数 $\mathcal{A}$ 的 $C^\ast$ 对角线。这使我们能够访问与 $C^\ast$-包含 $\mathcal{C} \hookrightarrow \mathcal{A}$ 关联的 Weyl 群形 $\mathcal{G}_\mathcal{C}$，它提供了 $\mathcal{A}$ 作为群形 $C^\ast$-代数的有价值的表示，其中模型的动力学由群形 1-cocycle $c_H$ 生成。借助该群形体的 $(c_H,\beta)$-KMS 度量的概念，我们识别了模型的完整 KMS 状态集，并证明了其对于 $\beta \in [0,\infty)$ 的唯一性。此外，我们表明它在 $\beta \rightarrow \infty$ 处的极限存在，并且与模型独特的无挫败基态一致。

title: Pseudo-magnetism in a strained discrete honeycomb lattice
abstract: Slowly varying nonuniform strains of non-magnetic wave propagating media with honeycomb symmetry induce an effective- or pseudo-magnetic field, a phenomenon observed first in graphene, and later in photonic crystals and other physical settings. Starting with a discrete nearest-neighbor tight-binding model of a non-uniformly strained honeycomb medium, we derive the continuum effective magnetic Dirac Hamiltonian governing the envelope dynamics of wave packets, which are spectrally localized near a Dirac point (conical band degeneracy) of the unperturbed honeycomb. For unidirectional deformations of bounded gradient, which preserve translation invariance along the ''armchair'' direction, we prove the existence of time-harmonic states which are plane-wave like (pseudo-periodic) along the armchair direction and exponentially localized transverse to it. We also obtain the leading order multi-scale structure of such modes for small deformation gradients. Their transverse localization are determined by the eigenstates of a one dimensional effective Dirac Hamiltonian. Our rigorous results apply to deformations which induce an approximate perpendicular constant pseudo-magnetic field (Landau gauge), and yield states with nearly flat band (Landau level) spectrum and hence very high density of states. In contrast, the analogous deformation which preserves translations in the zigzag direction induces no such localization. Corroborating numerical simulations for the different deformation types are presented.
summary:
具有蜂窝对称性的非磁波传播介质的缓慢变化的不均匀应变会产生有效磁场或赝磁场，这种现象首先在石墨烯中观察到，后来在光子晶体和其他物理环境中观察到。从非均匀应变蜂窝介质的离散最近邻紧束缚模型开始，我们推导了控制波包包络动力学的连续有效磁狄拉克哈密顿量，波包在光谱上位于未扰动蜂窝的狄拉克点（圆锥带简并）附近。对于有界梯度的单向变形，它保留了沿着“扶手椅”方向的平移不变性，我们证明了时谐态的存在，这些时谐态沿着扶手椅方向呈平面波状（伪周期），并且横向于扶手椅方向呈指数局域化。我们还获得了此类模式对于小变形梯度的先导多尺度结构。它们的横向局域化由一维有效狄拉克哈密顿量的本征态决定。

我们严格的结果适用于引起近似垂直恒定赝磁场（朗道规范）的变形，并产生具有近平带（朗道能级）谱的状态，因此具有非常高的状态密度。相反，保留锯齿方向平移的类似变形不会引起这种定位。提出了不同变形类型的验证数值模拟。

title: Homothetic Hodge$-$de Rham Theory and a Geometric Regularization of Elliptic Boundary Value Problems
abstract: We introduce a homothetic extension of classical Weyl integrable geometry by generalizing the usual linear gauge transformations to affine homothetic transformations centered at a distinguished harmonic, scale-invariant form $\alpha_d$. After relinearizing these affine gauge transformations via a suitable shift of variables, we obtain a twisted exterior calculus that is structurally equivalent to the Witten deformation of the de Rham complex. On this basis, we develop a corresponding homothetic Hodge theory: we define a twisted adjoint and homothetic Laplacian, and prove a homothetic Hodge decomposition theorem on compact Riemannian manifolds. In the context of partial differential equations, we show that the scalar homothetic Laplacian provides a rigorous diffuse interface (volume penalization) representation of elliptic boundary value problems. Modeling the Weyl scale field as a fixed distribution localized near a hypersurface, the resulting lower order geometric terms form a penalty layer that enforces Dirichlet, Neumann, or Cauchy data within a single geometric equation. This formulation yields consistent weak solutions even in the presence of classically incompatible Cauchy data. As an application, we construct a nonsingular model for point sources in elliptic field equations, which preserves the correct Coulombian far field while removing the core singularity and yielding finite field energy.
summary:
我们通过将通常的线性规范变换推广到以杰出的调和、尺度不变形式 $\alpha_d$ 为中心的仿射拟似变换，引入了经典 Weyl 可积几何的拟似扩展。通过适当的变量移位对这些仿射规范变换进行重新线性化后，我们获得了一个扭曲的外微积分，其在结构上相当于德拉姆复形的维滕变形。在此基础上，我们发展了相应的拟似Hodge理论：定义了扭曲伴随和拟似拉普拉斯算子，并证明了紧致黎曼流形上的拟似Hodge分解定理。在偏微分方程的背景下，我们证明标量拟似拉普拉斯算子提供了椭圆边值问题的严格扩散界面（体积惩罚）表示。将 Weyl 尺度场建模为位于超曲面附近的固定分布，生成的低阶几何项形成惩罚层，在单个几何方程中强制执行 Dirichlet、Neumann 或 Cauchy 数据。

即使存在经典不相容的柯西数据，该公式也能产生一致的弱解。作为一个应用，我们为椭圆场方程中的点源构建了一个非奇异模型，该模型保留了正确的库仑远场，同时消除了核心奇点并产生有限的场能量。

title: Waves within a network of slowly time-modulated interfaces: time-dependent effective properties, reciprocity and high-order dispersion
abstract: We consider wave propagation through a 1D periodic network of slowly time-modulated interfaces. Each interface is modelled by time-dependent spring-mass jump conditions, where mass and rigidity interface parameters are modulated in time. Low-frequency homogenisation yields a leading-order model described by an effective time-dependent wave equation, i.e.\ a wave equation with effective mass density and Young's modulus which are homogeneous in space but depend on time. This means that time-dependent bulk effective properties can be created by an array where only interfaces are modulated in time. The occurrence of k-gaps in case of a periodic modulation is also analysed. Second-order homogenisation is then performed and leads to an effective model which is reciprocal but encapsulates higher-order dispersive effects. These findings and the limitations of the models are illustrated through time-domain simulations.
summary: 我们考虑波通过缓慢时间调制界面的一维周期网络传播。每个界面均通过与时间相关的弹簧质量跳跃条件进行建模，其中质量和刚度界面参数随时间进行调制。低频均质化产生由有效的时间相关波动方程描述的主阶模型，即具有有效质量密度和杨氏模量的波动方程，它们在空间上均匀但取决于时间。这意味着可以通过仅及时调制接口的数组来创建与时间相关的批量有效属性。还分析了周期性调制情况下 k 间隙的出现。然后执行二阶均质化，并产生一个有效的模型，该模型是倒数的，但封装了高阶色散效应。这些发现和模型的局限性通过时域模拟进行了说明。

title: A Concentration of Measure Phenomenon in the Principal Chiral Model
abstract: We utilize the concentration of measure phenomenon to study the large $N$ limit of the $O(N)$ principal chiral model. The partition function in this limit is demonstrated to be that of a free massive theory.
summary: 我们利用测度集中现象来研究$O(N)$主手性模型的大$N$极限。该极限下的配分函数被证明是自由质量理论的配分函数。

title: Resonances in a Dirichlet quantum waveguide coupled to a cavity
abstract: We consider a Dirichlet waveguide in $\mathbb{R}^n$ ($n = 2,3$) with an attached cavity. We show that if the cavity admits a small gap, then the original embedded eigenvalues turn into resonances. The main question we address is how the size of the gap affects the resonant properties, in particular the imaginary part of the resonant pole. For example, in the case of a two dimensional waveguide with a gap of size $\varepsilon$, we show that the leading order term of the resonance behaves as $\mathcal O (\varepsilon^2)$. In the three-dimensional case, if the aperture is defined by a rectangular opening with volume proportional to $\varepsilon^2$, the resonant component behaves as $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^4)$. This shows that, in the analyzed class of models, the characteristic time scale associated with the resonances is generically of order $\mathcal{O}((\mathrm{vol}_\varepsilon)^{-2})$, where $\mathrm{vol}_\varepsilon$ denotes the volume of the aperture inducing the resonance.
summary: 我们考虑 $\mathbb{R}^n$ ($n = 2,3$) 中带有附加腔的狄利克雷波导。我们证明，如果空腔允许一个小间隙，那么原始嵌入的特征值就会变成共振。我们解决的主要问题是间隙的大小如何影响谐振特性，特别是谐振极的虚部。例如，在间隙大小为 $\varepsilon$ 的二维波导的情况下，我们表明谐振的主阶项表现为 $\mathcal O (\varepsilon^2)$。在三维情况下，如果孔径由体积与 $\varepsilon^2$ 成比例的矩形开口定义，则谐振分量的行为为 $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^4)$。这表明，在分析的模型类中，与共振相关的特征时间尺度通常为 $\mathcal{O}((\mathrm{vol}_\varepsilon)^{-2})$ 阶，其中 $\mathrm{vol}_\varepsilon$ 表示引起共振的孔径体积。

title: A symmetry formula for correlation functions in the superintegrable chiral Potts spin chain
abstract: We prove an exact finite-volume symmetry formula for two-point functions in the periodic $N$-state superintegrable chiral Potts spin chain. We show that, for every chain length $L$ and every simultaneous eigenvector of the Hamiltonian and the one-site translation operator, the correlations satisfy $\langle Z_0^r Z_R^{\dagger r}\rangle^*=\langle Z_0^r Z_{L-R}^{\dagger r}\rangle$ for $1\leqslant r\leqslant N-1$. Hence, whenever $L$ is even, the midpoint correlation $\langle Z_0^r Z_{L/2}^{\dagger r}\rangle$ is real. Then we generalise the three-state chain case to arbitrary $N$ and to every translation eigensector. This resolves a conjecture of Fabricius and McCoy.
summary: 我们证明了周期性 $N$ 态超可积手性 Potts 自旋链中两点函数的精确有限体积对称公式。我们证明，对于每个链长度 $L$ 以及哈密顿量和单点平移算子的每个联立特征向量，相关性满足 $\langle Z_0^r Z_R^{\dagger r}\rangle^*=\langle Z_0^r Z_{L-R}^{\dagger r}\rangle$ 对于 $1\leqslant r\leqslant N-1$。因此，只要 $L$ 为偶数，中点相关性 $\langle Z_0^r Z_{L/2}^{\dagger r}\rangle$ 就是实数。然后我们将三态链情况推广到任意 $N$ 和每个平移特征扇区。这解决了法布里修斯和麦考伊的猜想。

title: A Damage-Driven Model for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy: Early-Stage Dynamics and Invasion Thresholds
abstract: We introduce a spatially extended mathematical model for Duchenne muscular dystrophy based on a damage-driven paradigm, in which immune recruitment is triggered by tissue injury. The model is formulated as a reaction--diffusion--chemotaxis system describing the interaction between healthy tissue, damaged fibers, immune cells and inflammatory signals. We establish the global well-posedness of the system and investigate the early-stage dynamics through linearization around the healthy equilibrium. Our analysis shows that diffusion does not induce Turing instabilities, so that spatial heterogeneity cannot arise from diffusion-driven mechanisms. Instead, disease progression occurs through invasion processes. We derive explicit conditions for the onset of invasion, interpreted as an effective damage reproduction threshold and characterize the minimal propagation speed of pathological fronts, showing that the dynamics is governed by a pulled-front mechanism. Numerical simulations support the analytical results and confirm the transition between decay and invasion. These results provide a mathematical framework for early-stage disease progression and indicate that spatial patterns arise from the expansion of localized damage rather than from intrinsic pattern-forming mechanisms.
summary:
我们引入了一种基于损伤驱动范式的杜氏肌营养不良症的空间扩展数学模型，其中免疫招募是由组织损伤触发的。该模型被制定为反应-扩散-趋化系统，描述健康组织、受损纤维、免疫细胞和炎症信号之间的相互作用。我们建立系统的全局适定性，并通过围绕健康平衡的线性化来研究早期动态。我们的分析表明，扩散不会引起图灵不稳定性，因此空间异质性不会由扩散驱动的机制产生。相反，疾病进展是通过侵袭过程发生的。我们推导了入侵发生的明确条件，将其解释为有效的损伤再现阈值，并表征了病理前沿的最小传播速度，表明动力学是由拉锋机制控制的。数值模拟支持了分析结果并确认了衰变和入侵之间的转变。

这些结果为早期疾病进展提供了一个数学框架，并表明空间模式是由局部损伤的扩展产生的，而不是由内在的模式形成机制产生的。

title: Quasi-local probability averaging in the context of cutoff regularization
abstract: In this paper, we study the properties of averaged fundamental solutions of a special type for Laplace operators in the Euclidean space of an arbitrary dimension. We consider a class of kernels suitable for probabilistic averaging, and propose new representations for the deformed fundamental solutions and their values at zero. In addition, we give examples related to specific quantum field models in the context of studying renormalization properties.
summary: 在本文中，我们研究了任意维度的欧几里得空间中拉普拉斯算子的特殊类型的平均基本解的性质。我们考虑一类适合概率平均的核，并提出变形基本解及其零值的新表示。此外，我们还给出了在研究重正化性质的背景下与特定量子场模型相关的示例。

title: Three non-Hermitian random matrix universality classes of complex edge statistics: Spacing ratios and distributions
abstract: The conjectured three generic local bulk statistics amongst all non-Hermitian random matrix symmetry classes have recently been extended to three generic local edge statistics. We study analytically and numerically complex spacing ratios and nearest-neighbour (NN) spacing distributions that characterise such local statistics. We choose the three simplest representatives of these universality classes, given by the Gaussian ensembles of complex Ginibre, complex symmetric and complex self-dual matrices, denoted by class A, AI$^†$ and AII$^†$. In the first part, we analytically study the complex spacing ratio in class A, at finite matrix size $N$. Introducing a conditional point process, we simplify existing expressions and show why an uncontrolled approximation introduced earlier converges well in the large-$N$ limit in the bulk. When specifying to the elliptic Ginibre ensemble, we present a parameter-dependent $N=3$ surmise for the complex spacing ratio, interpolating to that of the Gaussian unitary ensemble (GUE), where such a surmise is very accurate. In the second numerical part, we compare complex spacing ratios, its moments, and NN spacing distributions for all three ensembles with that of uncorrelated points, the two-dimensional (2D) Poisson process, both in the bulk and at the edge. The varying degree of repulsion within these different edge universality classes can be well understood in terms of an effective 2D Coulomb gas description, at different values of inverse temperature $\beta$. We find indications that the complex spacing ratio does not fully unfold the local statistics at the edge. Finally we verify that for small argument, in all three symmetry classes the NN spacing distributions in the bulk and at the edge are consistent with the universal cubic repulsion.
summary:
所有非厄米随机矩阵对称类中推测的三个通用局部批量统计最近已扩展到三个通用局部边缘统计。我们研究了分析和数值上复杂的间距比率和最近邻（NN）间距分布，这些分布表征了此类局部统计数据。我们选择这些普遍性类的三个最简单的代表，由复数 Ginibre、复数对称和复数自对偶矩阵的高斯系综给出，用 A 类、AI$^†$ 和 AII$^†$ 表示。在第一部分中，我们分析研究了有限矩阵大小 $N$ 下 A 类的复数间距比。引入条件点过程，我们简化了现有表达式，并展示了为什么之前引入的不受控制的近似在批量的大$N$限制中很好地收敛。当指定椭圆 Ginibre 系综时，我们针对复间距比提出了一个参数相关的 $N=3$ 推测，插值到高斯酉系综 (GUE) 的推测，其中这种推测非常准确。

在第二个数值部分中，我们将所有三个系综的复间距比、其矩和 NN 间距分布与不相关点、二维 (2D) 泊松过程（在整体和边缘）进行比较。在不同的逆温度 $\beta$ 值下，这些不同边缘普适性类别内的不同程度的排斥可以根据有效的二维库仑气体描述来很好地理解。我们发现有迹象表明，复数间距比率并未完全展开边缘处的局部统计数据。最后，我们验证了对于小参数，在所有三个对称类中，主体和边缘的 NN 间距分布与通用立方斥力一致。

title: Geometry of the Ising persistence problem and the universal Bonnet-Manin Painlevé VI distribution
abstract: We determine the full persistence probability distribution for a non-Markovian stochastic process, motivated by first-passage questions arising in interacting spin systems and allied systems. We show that this distribution is governed by a distinguished Painlevé VI system arising from an exact Fredholm Pfaffian structure associated with the integrable sech kernel, $K_{\mathrm{sech}}=1/(2 \pi \cosh[(x-y)/2])$. The universal persistence exponent originally obtained by Derrida, Hakim and Pasquier is recovered as an asymptotic observable and acquires a natural geometric interpretation. In the stationary scaling regime, the persistence probability admits an exact Pfaffian decomposition into even and odd Fredholm determinants of the integrable \emph{sech} kernel. These determinants are controlled by a unique global solution of a second-order nonlinear ordinary differential equation, which is identified as a particular Painlevé VI equation. The corresponding Painlevé VI connection problem determines the persistence exponent as a limiting value at infinity. We further show that the Painlevé VI system governing persistence admits a direct geometric interpretation: the relevant solution coincides with the mean curvature of a one-parameter family of Bonnet surfaces immersed in $\mathbb R^3$. A folding transformation between such surfaces singles out the Painlevé VI equation with Manin coefficients $[0,0,0,0]$, which in particular governs the universal persistence distribution in the symmetric Ising case. In this framework, the persistence exponent is identified with the asymptotic mean curvature of the associated surface.
summary:
我们确定非马尔可夫随机过程的完全持久性概率分布，其动机是相互作用的自旋系统和联合系统中出现的第一阶段问题。我们表明，该分布受著名的 Painlevé VI 系统控制，该系统源自与可积 sech 核相关的精确 Fredholm Pfaffian 结构，$K_{\mathrm{sech}}=1/(2 \pi \cosh[(x-y)/2])$。最初由德里达、哈基姆和帕斯奎尔获得的普适持久性指数被恢复为渐近可观测量，并获得了自然的几何解释。在稳态缩放机制中，持续概率允许精确的普法夫分解为可积 \emph{sech} 核的偶数和奇数 Fredholm 行列式。这些行列式由二阶非线性常微分方程的唯一全局解控制，该方程被识别为特定的 Painlevé VI 方程。相应的 Painlevé VI 连接问题将持久指数确定为无穷大的极限值。

我们进一步表明，控制持久性的 Painlevé VI 系统承认一种直接的几何解释：相关解与浸入 $\mathbb R^3$ 中的 Bonnet 曲面的单参数族的平均曲率一致。这些曲面之间的折叠变换选出具有 Manin 系数 $[0,0,0,0]$ 的 Painlevé VI 方程，该方程特别控制对称 Ising 情况下的通用持久性分布。在此框架中，持续指数由相关表面的渐近平均曲率确定。

title: Invariant measures of randomized quantum trajectories
abstract: Quantum trajectories are Markov chains modeling quantum systems subjected to repeated indirect measurements. Their stationary regime depends on what observables are measured on the probes used to indirectly measure the system. In this article we explore the properties of quantum trajectories when the choice of probe observable is randomized. The randomization induces some regularization of the quantum trajectories. We show that non-singular randomization ensures that quantum trajectories purify and therefore accept a unique invariant probability measure. We furthermore study the regularity of that invariant measure. In that endeavour, we introduce a new notion of ergodicity for quantum channels, which we call multiplicative primitivity. It is a priory stronger than primitivity but weaker than positivity improving. Finally, we compute some invariant measures for canonical quantum channels and explore the limits of our assumptions with several examples.
summary: 量子轨迹是对经过重复间接测量的量子系统进行建模的马尔可夫链。它们的静止状态取决于用于间接测量系统的探头上测量的可观测值。在本文中，我们探讨了随机选择探针可观测值时量子轨迹的特性。随机化引起了量子轨迹的一些正则化。我们证明，非奇异随机化确保量子轨迹净化，因此接受唯一的不变概率度量。我们进一步研究了该不变测量的规律性。在这一努力中，我们引入了量子通道遍历性的新概念，我们称之为乘法本原性。它是一种比原始性更强但比积极性改善更弱的修道院。最后，我们计算了规范量子通道的一些不变度量，并通过几个例子探讨了我们假设的局限性。

title: Quantum Fuzzy Sets Revisited: Density Matrices, Decoherence, and the Q-Matrix Framework
abstract: In 2006 we proposed Quantum Fuzzy Sets, observing that states of a quantum register could serve as characteristic functions of fuzzy subsets, embedding Zadeh's unit interval into the Bloch sphere. That paper was deliberately preliminary. In the two decades since, the idea has been taken up by researchers working on quantum annealers, intuitionistic fuzzy connectives, and quantum machine learning, while parallel developments in categorical quantum mechanics have reshaped the theoretical landscape. The present paper revisits that programme and introduces two main extensions. First, we move from pure states to density matrices, so that truth values occupy the entire Bloch ball rather than its surface; this captures the phenomenon of semantic decoherence that pure-state semantics cannot express. Second, we introduce the Q-Matrix, a global density matrix from which individual quantum fuzzy sets emerge as local sections via partial trace. We define a category QFS of quantum fuzzy sets, establish basic structural properties (monoidal structure, fibration over Set), characterize the classical limit as simultaneous diagonalizability, and exhibit an obstruction to a fully internal Frobenius-algebra treatment.
summary:
2006 年，我们提出了量子模糊集，观察到量子寄存器的状态可以作为模糊子集的特征函数，将 Zadeh 的单位间隔嵌入到布洛赫球中。那篇论文故意是初步的。此后的二十年里，这个想法被研究量子退火器、直觉模糊连接词和量子机器学习的研究人员所采用，而分类量子力学的并行发展重塑了理论格局。本文重新审视该程序并介绍两个主要扩展。首先，我们从纯态转向密度矩阵，以便真值占据整个布洛赫球而不是其表面​​；这捕捉到了纯状态语义无法表达的语义退相干现象。其次，我们介绍 Q 矩阵，一个全局密度矩阵，其中各个量子模糊集通过部分迹线作为局部部分出现。

我们定义了量子模糊集的类别 QFS，建立了基本的结构特性（幺半结构、集合上的纤维化），将经典极限表征为同时对角化性，并展示了对完全内部 Frobenius 代数处理的阻碍。

title: Resurgence Theory and Holomorphic Quantum Mechanics
abstract: In this work, we study the resurgence program in holomorphic quantum mechanics. As a specific problem, we investigate the resurgence in the quartic anharmonic oscillator within holomorphic quantum mechanics, using the Bargmann representation of bosonic operators. In this framework, the perturbative energy series is shown to be Gevrey-1 and Borel summable only after continuation across the Stokes line. The instanton operator, realized as a coherent-state displacement in the Segal--Bargmann space, provides an explicit operatorial bridge between perturbative coefficients and non-perturbative sectors. Alien derivative relations generate the full resurgence triangle characteristic of the Bender--Wu model, and the resummed energy is expressed as a trans-series via a ratio of expectation values involving this instanton operator. As a concrete demonstration, we compute the first seven energy levels ($n=0,\dots,6$) up to sixth order in the coupling $g$; the resulting exact rational coefficients reproduce the classic Bender--Wu results, confirming the consistency and power of the holomorphic resurgence approach.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们研究了全纯量子力学中的复兴程序。作为一个具体问题，我们使用玻色子算子的巴格曼表示来研究全纯量子力学中四次非简振子的复兴。在此框架中，扰动能量级数仅在延续穿过 Stokes 线后才可求和为 Gevrey-1 和 Borel。瞬子算子在 Segal-Bargmann 空间中实现为相干态位移，在微扰系数和非微扰扇区之间提供了明确的算子桥梁。外来导数关系产生了 Bender--Wu 模型的完全复苏三角形特征，并且恢复能量通过涉及该瞬子算子的期望值的比率被表示为跨级数。作为具体演示，我们计算耦合 $g$ 中的前七个能级 ($n=0,\dots,6$) 直至第六阶；由此产生的精确有理系数再现了经典的 Bender--Wu 结果，证实了全纯复兴方法的一致性和威力。

title: Non-Relativistic Quantum Mechanics in Multidimensional Geometric Frameworks
abstract: A generalized formulation of non-relativistic quantum mechanics is developed within multidimensional geometric (NG) frameworks characterized by a power-law dispersion relation \(E \propto |p|^{j}\), where \(j = N - 1\).
